title: leucas oligocephala var. bowalensis
intro: Leucas oligocephala var. bowalensis, also known as Bowalensis Leucas, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in India and Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, due to its ability to boost immune function and reduce inflammation. Leucas oligocephala var. bowalensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in traditional medicine, and its extracts are also used in the formulation of herbal supplements and ointments.
